backend/main.mo: Main actor for the dairy business app defining data types (Customer, Cattle, DeliveryRecord, etc.) and CRUD operations with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization; manages customers, deliveries, milk production, cattle, feedback, and user profiles.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state to the new schema by converting LegacyDeliveryRecord (customerId) to DeliveryRecord (customerPrincipal: null) and initializing the new feedbackRecords map and nextFeedbackId counter.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: a customer-facing portal at /portal with Internet Identity login, delivery history, product catalog, and feedback form; and a flagged feedback admin section with delivery details and status update capability.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Truncated JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose, key fixes, and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the full shadcn/ui color system in both light and dark modes, plus base border and background body styles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Dairy Business App React SPA, mounting the app into a #root div and loading the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with eight routes (dashboard, cattle, milk, inventory, customers, deliveries, reports, and /portal for CustomerPortal), wrapped in QueryClientProvider and a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CattleForm.tsx: Reusable form component for adding or editing cattle records, with fields for breed, age, milk production, health status (including conditional sick-detail inputs), purchase info, and active/inactive status, guarded against double-submission via useRef.
frontend/src/components/CattleHealthChar: Renders a donut pie chart showing the distribution of cattle health statuses (Healthy, Sick, Recovered) using Recharts, with color-coded segments and an empty state message.
frontend/src/components/CustomerDelivery: Displays a customer's delivery history with summary stats (total, delivered, missed) and a sortable table, with an option to report issues via a feedback dialog.
frontend/src/components/CustomerFeedback: A modal dialog that allows customers to submit a text complaint for a specific delivery marked as delivered, calling the submitFeedback mutation and showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: A controlled form component for creating or editing a customer record with name, address, phone, and active status fields, with duplicate-submission protection via a ref.
frontend/src/components/DeliveryQuantity: Renders a bar chart of daily delivered milk quantities for the current month, aggregating delivery records by day using Recharts.
frontend/src/components/FlaggedFeedbackS: Displays a table of unresolved customer feedback items for admins, with loading/error/empty states and a button to open a resolve dialog for each flagged issue.
frontend/src/components/InventoryForm.ts: A React form component supporting two modes ('add' and 'update') for managing inventory items, with fields for name, category, quantity, unit, and low stock threshold.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component providing a sticky header with responsive desktop and mobile navigation links for admin pages and the customer portal.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionCh: A bar chart component that visualizes the last 7 days of milk production totals using Recharts, derived from an array of MilkRecord data.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionTr: A line chart component that displays a 30-day milk production trend using Recharts, with a fallback empty state when no data is available.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: A static product catalog component that displays farm products (milk and dairy) grouped by category in a card grid, with pricing and 'Popular' badges for highlighted items.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name to complete profile setup, submitting via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation and showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ResolveFeedbackD: A dialog component that displays customer feedback details and allows admins to mark it as resolved, showing error toasts for unauthorized or failed attempts.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppMessageM: A modal that previews a formatted WhatsApp delivery confirmation message for a customer and provides buttons to open WhatsApp directly or copy the message to clipboard.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity or anonymously, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: A small hook that wraps the Clipboard API to copy text, tracking copied state and errors with an auto-reset delay.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the backend actor, covering CRUD operations for customers, cattle, deliveries, milk records, feedback, and user profiles, along with time utility functions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a warm earthy CSS custom-property design system with light and dark mode tokens for the farm application.
frontend/src/lib/localTypes.ts: Defines a local TypeScript interface for an InventoryItem used in the frontend, not tied to the backend schema.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CattleManagement.tsx: React page for managing cattle records, displaying a table with health status badges and stats cards (total, active, sick, avg milk), with dialogs for adding and editing cattle using CattleForm.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerManagement.ts: React page for managing milk delivery customers, featuring a searchable table, stats cards (total/active/inactive), CSV export, and dialogs for adding and editing customers via CustomerForm.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerPortal.tsx: Customer-facing portal page that handles Internet Identity authentication, shows a login screen for unauthenticated users, and renders product catalog and delivery history tabs with a profile setup modal for new users.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page aggregating cattle, milk production, delivery, and customer data into summary cards, charts, a recent milk records table, and dismissible smart alerts for low production or missed deliveries.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryReports.tsx: Delivery reports page allowing staff to view today's and monthly delivery records filtered by month/year and search query, add new delivery records via a dialog form, export to CSV, and open a WhatsApp message modal per delivery.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryManagement.t: React page for managing farm inventory (feed, medicine, supplies) with add/update dialogs, low-stock alerts, and category-colored badges. Uses local state initialized with hardcoded sample items.
frontend/src/pages/MilkProduction.tsx: React page for logging and viewing daily milk production records per cattle, with date-range filtering, summary totals, charts, and CSV export.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyReports.tsx: React page that aggregates monthly delivery and milk production data, showing per-customer and per-delivery-boy breakdowns with summary stats and per-customer CSV download.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility module providing functions to export delivery records, milk production records, and customer records as downloadable CSV files.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappMessageFormat: Utility that formats a WhatsApp delivery confirmation message and generates a wa.me URL with the encoded message for a given phone number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (farm, warning, success, sidebar, chart palettes using oklch variables), fonts (Nunito, Merriweather), border radii, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate) with dark mode support.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for a Delivery Tracking App, documenting existing features (customer portal, flagged feedback admin section) and pending feature requests (backend delivery records with customerId, customer feedback system, admin feedback resolution) along with architectural notes and known build issues.
